reviews.review_title: One of the best pure puzzle games
reviews.review_description:
For adults who like puzzles, I think this game offers a perfect balance of progression & challenge. I completed the entire game without getting frustrated, needing help, giving up, or getting bored.

The game has a simple but cute narrative that's funny & engaging. The objects & environments are colorful & whimsical, & the hamsters are adorable.

It has 3 different series of puzzles, each with a unique style of gameplay. Each series progresses from easy to challenging. When one series reaches a level of difficulty that might deter some players, the game gives you the option to start the next series (at which point you can continue in either series).

There are also several different kinds of mini-game puzzles which support your progress in the main puzzle.

I found it hard to "get" the patterns in the donut mini-game puzzles. Most of the time I felt like I was just mashing buttons randomly — but fortunately, that eventually worked. Offering some hints / tips would be nice.

Requests:
- Ability to save your progress in the middle of a puzzle, & then when you come back, have the option to either reload your saved progress or reset the puzzle.
- Ability to take in-game screenshots to keep track of partial solutions, etc.
- Rather than (or in addition to) using the remote control to slide pegs, have the ability to move them with your hands.
- Make the remote control sticky somehow, so that you don't have to keep holding the grip button — e.g. press and release the grip button to toggle (equip/unequip) the remote.
- I would love to be able to pet the hamsters and interact with some of the objects in the environment.

All in all, a very fun and extremely well-designed puzzle game. 🥰

I am glad I got this game it's funny and it tests your skills, some are really challenging that is what makes the game so grate the visual effects are amazing the overall quality of the game is epic I never seen anything like it gotta be the best single player VR game I have ever seen.

A truly great puzzle game. I really enjoyed this puzzle game. Not only the tube puzzles, but also everything around it. The story, the mini-games, the factory - all very well done. 60 levels, 20 levels per floor, and each floor has different focuses/mechanics.

A beautifully designed world, and I also appreciate the attention to detail. There is so much to discover! They could have just made the puzzles, but there was so much done around it... It reminded me a bit of "Rainbow Reactor: Fusion", where you not only had to do the puzzles, but you had rooms to walk around, complete small tasks, or play mini-games.

You can tell that a lot of brainpower went into this game, and the puzzles are clever and varied. The playtime is also quite long. Highly recommended for puzzle enthusiasts.

A fun and cute puzzle game.

The first nine levels is a good warm-up to get into the game. On level ten I got stuck thinking there must be a tube missing, or well hidden. But most likely l have a lack of brainpower. I'm going to recharge and then get back into the game to show the boss who's the boss.

Dressing up your hamster is a nice touch, and adds to replayability.

One very minor thing I found a bit "irritating" is having to press A for hamsters to continue talking. I would like a setting that makes them keep talking until finished, or waiting for me to reply.

Tube be or not tube be, that is the question.

I've only played the free demo (huge thanks to the devs for providing one) and knew within about 5 minutes this would be a must-buy. This seems like Silhouette without the hand tracking and with a hamster pal. The hamsters are so cute (even the boss), the mechanics work really well, and the mini game (games? Hopefully more coming) is a unique way to keep things interesting. I'm weirdly excited to earn the Viking horns and tiger skin for my little guy. Also seems great for kids (maybe not too young, as even in the demo I found myself stumped so long my hamster fell asleep waiting for me to do something). Anyone who enjoys puzzles and brain teasers will like this!

Gameplay: https://youtu.be/o9iuNU9wnYE

This game beat my expectations there's so much in here. Move the tubes to rescue the hamsters sounds easy it gets challenging. 

Play small mini games to collect more tubes to save the hamster. With over 40 levels this will keep you busy for hours. 

Plenty of unlockables to dress up the hamster or change his look. With a story and comedy to go along with it. 

It works really well with plenty of settings and a must buy for any puzzle lover.

reviews.review_title: I'm 60 years old and enjoyed this game
reviews.review_description:
I really thought this was going to be a "kids" game but after playing the beta test I found it fun, entertaining, and challenging.  I liked it so much that I purchased the full game.  It starts out really easy but gets harder and harder as you go further and further.  Helping the hamster get through the puzzles can get tricky.  

Kids will love it as well as adults.  It helps with your coordination and cognitive abilities and it is just so cute to watch the hamsters go from point A to point B to point C and so on.

The problem comes when you have very limited tubes to add and have to finish other puzzles to earn tubes & connectors to help you finish the run.

I think this game is perfect and had NO glitches at all.  It is ready for the main store page!

Tube Be Continued is a cute little puzzle game that has you saving the job of one head hamster boss! The game has you solving a ton of puzzles through the Tube Industries. You must find parts of the tubes around the factory and connect them in the right order to get each hamster to their food bowl. The game is unique and I love the characters! You can customize the hamsters and there are several mini games and floors to keep you coming back for more! If you like puzzle games this is a game almost anyone can play!

Video Review:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f22-5xZYfWM

Tried the demo and immediately wanted the full game. Novel puzzles mixed with mini-games to keep it fresh, absolutely gorgeous (and cute) animation and the humor is fabulous. Haven't enjoyed a game THIS much in a while.

The hamsters are surprisingly realistic! Had to stop myself playing so I don't use it all up. And being able to choose a hamster and what its wearing are really fun touches. Highly, HIGHLY recommend.

This plays like a completed game, even though some sections are clearly still under construction.

Since it's still in development, things I'd love to see:
1. Ability to turn off smooth locomotion. Even with the sensitivity down, it's still easy to accidentally move.

2. Picking up dropped items doesn't always work, but I love LOVE the feature that they just go back to the board. 

3. I don't know how big an ask this is, but I want to pet the hamsters.

If I think of more as I progress I'll add them, but as it stands, this game is fantastic. Can't wait to see the rest of it. I don't like to pay for unofficial games  but this one is well, well worth it.

developer_response.body:
All of us on the development team really appreciate this review! It's a pleasant surprise to read this on a Monday morning. 

We love that you love the game, thank you. It's a ton of fun. Thank you for the feedback suggestions! 

We invite you to join our discord community if you wanna share more feedback and keep up with announcements. 
https://discord.gg/wVUwqZkjKt


1. Noted, we'd love to hear more from you about this issue in our discord!
2. We will continue to improve the distance grab functionality and feel. Thanks for the compliment on the "auto pickup" feature!
3. We will look into this one! :D


Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description: So love game so far, so cute and just buy it but reason for 4 stars only, I'm stuck on hamster hangout 6 where the lab is introduced I can see it's u needing to make another tube missing for puzzle but plzzz tell me what to do w the remote thingy w 3 dots I can not b only one who has stuck here just like the late for work shooting hamster mini game gav a tutorial and common sense u could get that game but remote thingy needs tutorial a sign explaining I'll take whatever I can get I hav done everything I can think of and nothing😬😒😆 probably very easy but definitely needs added plzzzz help asap can't wait to c what's next.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We appreciate your feedback, and we will see what we can do about improving the tutorial for the joystick remote in Hamster Hangout 6. In the meantime, here are some tips: The joystick remote consists of two parts, the top and the base. In order to start the puzzle, you must attach the top onto the base. Then you can use the joystick to move the ball. The 3 dots on the base connect to the 3 prongs on the joystick. We hope this helps, and if you need any more assistance or have suggestions, you're welcome to join our discord! https://discord.gg/sJrnAmkzff

reviews.review_description: It’s hard to believe that is only took 5 people to design a game this amazing! My whole family is in love! Hoping for more tube adventures!!!
